productDisplayName: Citizen Men White Dial Eco-Drive Watch AW1010-57B
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: White dial with three hands and markings, glow-in-the-dark inlays on the hour and minute handsFeatures: A screw to reset time, a date aperture, Eco-Drive technologyStrap style: Silver-toned bracelet style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater resistance up to 50 mComes in a signature Citizen caseWarranty: 1 year international warranty, 3 years 3 months and 3 days warranty within India
